field_or_component: sc_taxonomy_fit Field Note and planned coder start-pack illustration
change_description: Added point-of-use guidance that Cannot assess from register entry records inability to judge taxonomy fit from insufficient visible evidence and is distinct from Partial Fit or No Fit, which indicate a genuine taxonomy limitation for a sufficiently understood project.
evidence_or_reason: Further feedback was invited from all three scratch coders; all three responded; no additional substantive taxonomy or instrument concerns were raised; one coder requested clearer operational guidance; screenshot-based guidance remains planned for the coder start pack.
protocol_effect: Protocol v0.12 records resolved pilot-driven instrument changes and retains fresh live REDCap runtime QA as a pre-use gate.
pilot_or_formal_data_effect: Candidate-0.3 pilot responses remain unchanged; the clarification applies only to the formal review candidate and changes no stored response code or classification rule.
approval: Offline repository validation passed; this is not formal approval, instrument freeze, or live-runtime-QA approval.
status: Current review candidate; coder feedback resolved; coder-pack illustration, fresh live REDCap runtime QA, and formal-instrument freeze pending.

field_or_component: record_kind; coder_declaration; sc_blind_decl visibility; sc_exposure wording and note; common scratch guard
change_description: Made the permitted-material declaration a one-time coder-level governance control; preserved the historical candidate-0.3 per-project declaration; and captured prior involvement, professional or institutional familiarity, and accidental prohibited-information exposure separately for every coder–project assignment. A flagged coder still completes classification from permitted evidence.
evidence_or_reason: Exposure can vary by project whereas the permitted-material commitment is made once before formal coding. Candidate 0.6 had been imported and partially inspected but was superseded before final runtime QA; it collected no formal data.
protocol_effect: Active unregistered protocol v0.12 is amended in place to specify one declaration per scratch coder, per-project exposure capture, primary retention of flagged responses, conditional sensitivity analysis, and residual-knowledge limitation.
pilot_or_formal_data_effect: Candidate-0.3 pilot responses, sc_blind_decl codes and historical export mappings remain unchanged. No formal declaration, formal assignment or sample was created.
approval: Formal instrument and governance clarification; repository implementation only. Candidate 0.7 remains a review candidate pending fresh live runtime QA and formal freeze.
status: Current review candidate; not frozen, not live-runtime-QA approved, and not authorised for formal coding.
